prestazioni: Supercharged 3.5L Toyota 2GR-FE V6 (engine code: 2GR-FE) upgraded with a Harrop HTV 2650 supercharger (12psi boost, 450hp) paired with a custom Lotus Motorsport intercooler and charge pipes (aluminum 6061-T6, 3-inch diameter)
Full titanium exhaust system by Akrapovič (4-2-1 header design, 70mm dual outlets) with a valved bypass for track/cruise modes, utilizing Lotus-specific mounting points and heat shielding

Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (4-way adjustable, 250lb/in front / 300lb/in rear springs) with Lotus-specific top mounts and spherical bearing conversion, paired with Eibach anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polybushings
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated brake ducts and Lotus OEM-spec mounting points, finished in satin clear coat
Vorsteiner V-FF 107 18x9.5 (front) / 18x11 (rear) forged wheels (ET35 front, ET45 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 305/30/18 rear) and Lotus-specific hub-centric spacers

Lotus Exige S Cup-spec carbon fiber rear wing (3-piece, adjustable angle) with Gurney flap and titanium mounting hardware, paired with a custom front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-stage adjustable)
